candidates: The charger accepts 4 to 9 volts.
The charger accepts 5 to 9 volts.
challenge_notes: Numeric bounds should preserve closed, open, and between-range scope.

candidates: Applicants aged 17 are eligible.
Applicants aged 18 through 64 are eligible.
challenge_notes: Numeric bounds should preserve closed, open, and between-range scope.
references: Applicants must be at least 18 and under 65.

candidates: The freezer may stay at -5 degrees Celsius.
The freezer must stay between -20 and -10 degrees Celsius.
challenge_notes: Numeric bounds should preserve closed, open, and between-range scope.
expected_emitted_text: The freezer must stay between -20 and -10 degrees Celsius.
references: The freezer must stay between -20 and -10 degrees Celsius.

candidates: The door lock always engages.
The door lock engages when the alarm is armed.
challenge_notes: Conditioned support should not be emitted as unconditional or opposite-condition support.
expected_emitted_text: The door lock engages when the alarm is armed.
references: If the alarm is armed, the door lock engages.

candidates: Backups are uploaded even if encryption fails.
Backups are uploaded after encryption succeeds.
challenge_notes: Conditioned support should not be emitted as unconditional or opposite-condition support.
expected_emitted_text: Backups are uploaded after encryption succeeds.
references: Backups are uploaded after encryption succeeds and are not uploaded if encryption fails.

candidates: Members get the discount on weekends.
Members get the discount on weekdays.
challenge_notes: Conditioned support should not be emitted as unconditional or opposite-condition support.
expected_emitted_text: Members get the discount on weekdays.
references: Members get the discount on weekdays, not weekends.

candidates: Interns can enter the lab.
Interns cannot enter the lab, and supervisors can enter after hours.
challenge_notes: Nested exceptions should preserve the excluded subgroup while retaining supported allowances.
expected_emitted_text: Interns cannot enter the lab, and supervisors can enter after hours.
references: All staff can enter the lab except interns; supervisors can enter after hours.

candidates: The importer accepts animated GIFs.
The importer accepts static GIFs but not animated GIFs.
challenge_notes: Nested exceptions should preserve the excluded subgroup while retaining supported allowances.
expected_emitted_text: The importer accepts static GIFs but not animated GIFs.
references: The importer accepts images except animated GIFs; it accepts static GIFs.

candidates: The clinic treats all adults including emergency walk-ins.
The clinic treats adults except emergency walk-ins.
challenge_notes: Nested exceptions should preserve the excluded subgroup while retaining supported allowances.
expected_emitted_text: The clinic treats adults except emergency walk-ins.
references: The clinic treats adults except emergency walk-ins; children require referral.

candidates: Runner B finished first and Runner A finished second.
Runner A finished first and Runner B finished second.

references: Runner A finished first. Runner B finished second. Runner C finished third.
